ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ship_performance" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance data */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "cmp_speed" REAL /* Speed of the ship's main engine (CMP) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power output of the ship's main engine */,
  "fuel_flow" REAL /* Fuel flow rate */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the ship */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the ship */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the ship */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the ship in meters */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Flag state of the ship */,
  "last_dry_dock" TEXT /* Date of the last dry dock maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high CO2 emissions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the company or individual who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predicted_maintenance" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance needed */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the maintenance need */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "recommender" TEXT /* Name of the system or person who made the prediction */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_maintenance_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ship operator, maintenance engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly performance, maintenance forecast) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value from the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor value */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the ship */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
